rule_description: The target trial allows patients who have received platinum as potentially curative treatment for a prior cancer, provided at least 12 months have elapsed, while prior trials exclude patients who have received chemotherapy for any abdominal or pelvic tumor, highlighting a difference in prior treatment eligibility. Severity: 0.9

plan.llm_instruction: Check if the patient has received chemotherapy for any abdominal or pelvic tumor. Return 'Yes' or 'No' only. Do not explain your answer.
